options.name: <object_list>
options.description: List of objects: cells, nets, or library cells

options.name: -include_inherited
options.description: Reports the object names from which the derating factor values are inherited (bool, optional) > <filename[.gz]> # Redirects output to the specified file (redirect_operator, optional) >> <filename[.gz]> # Redirects output to the specified file
